ogTitle: Yuleba South vs Yungaburra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yuleba South and Yungaburra.
heading: Yuleba South vs Yungaburra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yuleba South, Queensland and Yungaburra, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yuleba South has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Yungaburra (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yuleba South or Yungaburra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yuleba South has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Yungaburra scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yuleba South scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Yungaburra scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yuleba South or Yungaburra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yuleba South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
